Converts a PDF file to Excel format.

Converts a PDF file to Excel format with progress callback.

Converts a PDF file to HTML format.

Converts a PDF file to HTML format with progress callback.
startPDFToImage(String, String, String, ImageOptions) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to a series of images.
startPDFToImage(String, String, String, ImageOptions, ConvertCallback) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to a series of images with progress callback.
startPDFToJson(String, String, String, JsonOptions) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to structured JSON format.
startPDFToJson(String, String, String, JsonOptions, ConvertCallback) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to structured JSON format with progress callback.
startPDFToMarkdown(String, String, String, MarkdownOptions) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to Markdown format.
startPDFToMarkdown(String, String, String, MarkdownOptions, ConvertCallback) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to Markdown format with progress callback.

Converts a PDF file to OFD format.
startPDFToOfd(String, String, String, OfdOptions, ConvertCallback) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to OFD format with progress callback.
startPDFToPpt(String, String, String, PptOptions) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to PowerPoint format.
startPDFToPpt(String, String, String, PptOptions, ConvertCallback) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to PowerPoint format with progress callback.
startPDFToRtf(String, String, String, RtfOptions) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to RTF (Rich Text Format).

Converts a PDF file to RTF (Rich Text Format) with progress callback.
startPDFToSearchablePdf(String, String, String, SearchablePdfOptions) - Static method in class com.pdfsolid.conversion.CPDFConversion
Converts a PDF file to a searchable PDF.

Converts a PDF file to a searchable PDF with progress callback.

Converts a PDF file to plain text format.

Converts a PDF file to plain text format with progress callback.

Converts a PDF file to Word format.
